steps: Figure 1. Procedure for using QuickExtract DNA Extraction Solution [1] Wash cells with 100 µL PBS & aspirate.
Scrape well bottom with pipette tip to detach cells.
Transfer cells to labelled PCR tubes.
Resuspend IDT primers with H 2 O to 100 μM - Example: 20 nmol – Add 200 µL H 2 O .
Dilute primer to 10 μM in a new microcentrifuge tube - Example: 20 µL + 180 µL H 2 O .

Prepare Master Mix – Number of reactions + 1 (as extra). For each PCR tube: 1 µL DNA sample + 19 µL Master Mix. Bio-Rad Thermal Cycler – Select/Edit Protocol (see PCR Cycle below). Master Mix – for one 20 µL reaction : %s %s PCR Cycle : %s %s Annealing temperature should be 5 °C - 10 °C lower than Tm of primers.
creator: Claire D Clelland
